  [ac-1]
    Given: multiple PTY sessions are running
    When: GET /sessions is called on localhost:19836
    Then: a JSON array of all sessions is returned with id, cwd, backend, projectPath, projectName, and spawnedAt
  [ac-2]

    When: POST /sessions/{id}/input is called with text

Execution context:

- Files: orchestrator-api.ts, auth-rate-limit.ts, pty.ts (ipc-handlers), websocket-manager.ts (mobile-server), middleware.ts
- Verification: TypeScript compile, existing tests
[2026-03-10T04:39:28.161Z] @claude:
Review findings:

Code quality of f326f9f is GOOD — all 6 bug fixes are correct and well-implemented:

4. Pending prompt leak on spawn failure: catch block resolves pending promise immediately
5. WS subscription leak on PTY exit: broadcastPtyExit() cleans both ptyStreams and terminalSubscriptions
6. CORS substring bypass: Origin parsed as URL, hostname validated against exact patterns
